entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: A cereal grain crop grown in Ethiopia used in mixed farming systems

entities.name: TEFF
entities.description: A small-seeded cereal grass grown in Ethiopia used in mixed farming systems

entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: The country where the research on landscape-based nutrient application was conducted

entities.name: NUTRIENT VARIABILITY
entities.description: The variation of nutrients across different landscape positions in smallholder farming systems

entities.name: SOIL HEALTH
entities.description: The state of the soil in smallholder farming systems, characterized as poor in this context

entities.name: LANDSCAPE SEGMENTATION APPROACH
entities.description: A method used to address gaps in farm-scale nutrient management by dividing the landscape into positions

entities.name: CO-DEVELOPMENT APPROACH
entities.description: A demand-driven approach involving farmers and extension agents to diagnose nutrient management practices

entities.name: SMART MOBILE APP
entities.description: A digital tool used by extension agents to generate crop-specific decision rules and communicate fertilizer applications

entities.name: DIGITAL ADVISORY
entities.description: The use of digital tools to optimize landscape-targeted fertilizer management

entities.name: LANDSCAPE-TARGETED FERTILIZER MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The application of fertilizer based on specific landscape positions such as hillslopes, mid-slopes, and foot slopes

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area, which showed improvement with landscape-specific application

entities.name: NUTRIENT USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which crops utilize applied nutrients

entities.name: NET BENEFIT
entities.description: The economic gain per hectare after subtracting costs

entities.name: BENEFIT-TO-COST RATIO
entities.description: A ratio used to demonstrate the return on investment for landscape-targeted fertilizer

entities.name: HILLSLOPE
entities.description: A specific landscape position where fertilizer rates were found to be too high

entities.name: MID-SLOPE
entities.description: A specific landscape position where fertilizer application was optimized

entities.name: FOOT SLOPE
entities.description: A specific landscape position where fertilizer application was optimized
